name: A Recipe for Love
original_name: สูตรเสน่หา
overview: Alin, a struggling actress, hosts a cooking show to revive her career and impress the show's producer, Anucha. Unable to cook, she secretly trains with Din, a tough but honest chef. As the show succeeds, Alin finds herself torn between the glamorous life she wants with Anucha and the genuine connection she shares with Din.

trailers.title: Teaser สูตรเสน่หา
